ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of assistant coaches */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game took place */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of referees */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western)
Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific)
Name of the team's home arena
Name of the team's general manager
Name of the team's head coach
Timestamp of the last update to the team's record

Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs)
Number of spectators at the game
Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime
Timestamp of the last update to the game's record
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan)
Timestamp of when the user account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the user's account
Boolean indicating if the user account is active
